---
title: "FlipR-data"
subtitle: "Statistical Programmer · R · Shiny"
page-layout: full
---

## About me

Statistical programmer in the pharmaceutical industry (CDISC, ADaM, TLFs).
I use R daily for data analysis, reporting, and Shiny applications.
I also apply R to other domains — sports analytics, finance, and more.

## Projects

::: {.card}
### Adverse Event Explorer
**Pharma · Shiny**  
Interactive dashboard for CDISC ADaM safety data exploration.  
[View project](projects/adverse-event-explorer.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
### World Football R
**Sport · R**  
Analysis and visualisation of football statistics using worldfootballR.  
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/FlipR-data/worldFootballR)
:::
